title: Mobile Architecture
description: Designing scalable, maintainable mobile applications using Clean Architecture, MVVM, MVI, and Repository patterns across Flutter, native iOS (Swift/SwiftUI), and Android (Kotlin/Jetpack Compose). Deep experience building modular, feature-toggled, and white-label multi-tenant platforms serving multiple enterprise clients from a single codebase.

title: Native iOS & Android
description: Full native mobile development across both platforms: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, ARKit, and Combine on iOS; Kotlin, Java, Jetpack Compose, and Dagger on Android. Delivered production apps to 10M+ users at Syriatel, with deep expertise in security hardening, test automation (XCTest, Espresso), and AR experiences (ARKit/ARCore).

title: Cross-Platform with Flutter
description: Expert Flutter delivery across e-commerce, healthcare, fintech, and enterprise ERP domains. Deep expertise in BLoC, Clean Architecture, offline-first patterns, and AI-augmented development with GitHub Copilot and Claude Code. Delivered white-label platforms used by multiple enterprise tenants.

title: IoT & Connected Devices
description: Bridging mobile with hardware through MQTT, BLE, NFC, and gRPC. Building custom native SDKs and Method Channel bridges to integrate smart locks, IP cameras, LPR systems, and precision measurement instruments — with direct experience on a production IoT parking management platform.

title: Security & Compliance
description: Implementing enterprise-grade mobile security across fintech, healthcare, and ERP platforms: OAuth2/JWT, RBAC, PCI-DSS-compliant encrypted storage, biometric auth, end-to-end encryption, iOS Keychain, Android Keystore, and ProGuard hardening. Remediated vulnerabilities identified in external penetration tests at Syriatel.

title: Team Leadership & CI/CD
description: Building mobile departments from scratch — defining stacks, designing sprint structures, hiring, onboarding, and establishing code review culture. Setting up automated release pipelines with Codemagic and GitHub Actions, reducing release cycle times by up to 25% and accelerating multi-team delivery at scale.
